findings.title: Samsung MagicINFO + SimpleHelp Added to CISA KEV — Three Enterprise RCE/Path Traversal Flaws Under Active Exploitation
findings.summary: CISA added three enterprise flaws to KEV on 2026-04-24: Samsung MagicINFO unauthenticated path-traversal to JSP RCE (Mirai recruitment) and a SimpleHelp RMM key-escalation + zip-slip RCE pair chained by initial access brokers against MSP customer fleets.

findings.title: D-Link DIR-823X CVE-2025-29635 Added to CISA KEV — Mirai Campaign Now Federally Mandated
findings.summary: D-Link DIR-823X command-injection flaw covered as Nexcorium Mirai exploitation on 2026-04-23 was added to the CISA KEV catalog on 2026-04-24 with a May 15 federal patch deadline; many affected models are EOL so practical guidance is replacement.

noted.summary: Chinese-speaking APT (APT23 / Earth Centaur) using military-themed ZIP lures with a backdoored SumatraPDF reader to deploy AdaptixC2 over GitHub C2 (Zscaler, 2026-04-24); desktop-client vector keeps it out of News tier.
12-year-old TOCTOU race in PackageKit transaction state machine enables LPE to root across Debian, Ubuntu, Fedora, RHEL ('Pack2TheRoot'); no remote component, fixed in PackageKit 1.3.5.
Bulk Linux kernel CVE batch disclosed 2026-04-24; CVSS scores not yet populated, watch for individual high-impact items as NVD scoring lands.
Two new ActiveMQ CVEs (CVSS 6.5 and 8.8) disclosed 2026-04-24, distinct from CVE-2026-34197 Jolokia RCE in KEV but on the same exposed broker surface.
High-severity issue (CVSS 8.1) in widely-imported JS library, technical details pending.
Workflow scheduler vulnerability (CVSS 8.1); sometimes internet-exposed in data-engineering deployments.
ADT confirms data breach following ShinyHunters extortion threat (2026-04-24); part of the same actor cluster behind Vercel, McGraw-Hill, Infinite Campus and HackerOne incidents.
Pre-Stuxnet-era industrial sabotage tool surfaces in US-Iran tension reporting; targets precision-calculation software with self-propagation, limited deployment scope.
20K users impacted by extensions harvesting Google and Telegram credentials; browser-extension surface largely out of standard scope but worth GPO-driven extension allowlisting.
Notification database retains 'deleted' Signal messages; enabled FBI iPhone forensic recovery, mobile-only / out of scope but covered widely.
Restricted internal AI model finds vulnerabilities at scale (271 Firefox + OS kernel issues); methodology disclosure rather than defensive item, false-positive rate undisclosed.
